title: APP
sub: Programs used by you AND your agents — any language. Open them inside Flowork.
store_intro: Install an app from a .fwpack bundle. Apps install live — no restart.
store_local: Manual install: drop a folder at
store_remote: Remote catalog (browse & install community apps) — coming soon.
store_exec_warn: This app runs a program on your computer (its core, any language). Only install apps you trust. Continue?
uninstall_confirm: Uninstall app "{name}"? Its folder and state are removed.
empty: No apps yet. The bundled 'Shared Notepad' (Python) proves it: you and an agent edit the same note.
